info.description: A resource is a machine or another piece of equipment used to perform an operation. A resource may be something as simple as a drill, or as complex as an automatic component feeder. This API allows you to retrieve, create, update, or delete a resource and custom field definitions, change resource status, load or unload a resource bin from an inventory or a material.
info.title: Resource

get.description: Retrieves a list of resources by plant or by resource name and plant.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The name to retrieve a resource.

200.description: The list of resources was returned.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

post.description: Creates a resource by the given request.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: The resource type, order, or plant was not found.

patch.description: Updates the existing resource by the given request.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: The resource, resource type, order, or plant was not found.

412.description: The resource has already been updated by another user.

delete.description: Deletes the existing resource by the given request.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: The resource or plant was not found.

412.description: The resource cannot be deleted because it's already in use.

get.description: Retrieves a resource by plant and resource name.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The name to retrieve a resource.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

get.description: Retrieves a list of resources by plant or by resource name and plant.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The quantity of resource records to be returned. If it is not specified, the default value is 100. The maximum allowed value is 100.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The number of a page to be returned. The page number starts with 0. If it is not defined, the first page is returned.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: This parameter is used for sorting. To define the sorting order, use comma-separated values, like 'resource,desc'. The default sorting order is ascending. The following sorting parameters are supported: modifiedDateTime, createdDateTime, resource, description, and status.

200.description: The list of resources was returned.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

post.description: Creates a resource by the given request.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: The resource type, order, or plant was not found.

patch.description: Updates the existing resource by the given request.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: The resource, resource type, order, or plant was not found.

409.description: Conflict as a result of multiple identical requests.

412.description: The resource has already been updated by another user.

post.description: Changes the status of the provided resource based on the provided parameters.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

post.description: Requires a material or inventory that is in the assembly data fields (INVENTORY_ID, INVENTORY_ID_SFC, or SFC). If there is an inventory in the assembly data fields its size will be decreased by the loaded bin quantity. If the Bin is already loaded new loading will be added to the queue.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

post.description: When you unload a resource bin that has been loaded from the inventory, the quantity in the bin is returned to the inventory.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

get.summary: Retrieves a list of custom field definitions for the resource.
get.description: Returns all maintained custom field definitions, for a given plant.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: The plant where a custom field definitions are defined.

200.description: The list of custom field definitions was returned.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

post.summary: Creates a custom field definition for the resource.
post.description: Creates a custom field definition for the resource by the given request.

201.description: The custom field definition was created.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

409.description: The custom field definition already exists.

patch.summary: Updates a custom field definition for the resource.
patch.description: Updates field label or sequence in the custom field definition for the resource.

200.description: The custom field definition was updated.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: The custom field definition or plant was not found.

412.description: The custom field definition has already been updated by another user.

delete.summary: Deletes a custom field definition for the resource.
delete.description: Deletes the existing custom field definition for the resource by the given request.

204.description: The custom field definition was deleted.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: The custom field definition or plant was not found.

412.description: Cannot delete custom field definition because it is used in other objects.

plant.description: The plant where a resource is defined.

process.description: Indicates that the resource is processed.

sfcLimit.description: The number of shop floor controls that can be processed for the resource. If this field equals zero, there is no limit for the quantity of shop floor controls.

immediateStatusChange.description: Indicates that the resource status changes immediately or when the last shop floor control is completed at this resource.

setupState.description: The setup state of the resource.

inQueueCapacity.description: The resource input queue capacity. 0 means that the resource queue management is disabled. You must always set both input and output queue capacities.

outQueueCapacity.description: The resource output queue capacity. 0 means that the resource queue management is disabled. You must always set both input and output queue capacities.

inQueueManagement.description: The type of the resource input queue management.

outQueueManagement.description: The type of the resource output queue management.

asset.description: The asset assigned to the resource.

bins.description: The list of bins for the resource.

customValues.description: The custom values of the resource.

types.description: The list of the resource types assigned to the resource.

setups.description: The list of resource setups with assigned orders.

shifts.description: The list of shifts assigned to the resource.

technicalObjects.description: The list of technical objects assigned to the resource.

createdDateTime.description: The date time when the resource was created.

modifiedDateTime.description: The date time when the resource was updated.

ResourceDeleteRequest.description: The request for the resource removal.

comments.description: The comment provided for the resource status change.

immediate.description: Indicates whether the status will be changed immediately. By default it's set to false.

recordType.description: Indicates whether the status was changed manually or automatically.

resource.description: The resource whose status needs to be changed.

user.description: The user who changes the resource status.

reasonCode.description: The reason code hierarchy that is used for the resource status change.

bin.description: The name of a resource bin to be loaded.

loadQuantity.description: The quantity of a material to be loaded into a resource bin. If not specified, the material is considered infinite.

material.description: The material that will be loaded into a resource bin.

resource.description: The resource whose bin needs to be loaded.

LoadResourceBinRequest.description: The request to load a resource bin.

bin.description: The name of a resource bin to be unloaded.

executionStatus.description: The execution status of the order: NOT_IN_EXECUTION, ACTIVE, HOLD, CLOSED, COMPLETED, DISCARDED.
